title: WALK-IN CLINIC - 211info
text: SISKIYOU COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINIC GRANTS PASS WALK-IN CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides acute medical care for minor emergencies and illnesses for adults and children, such as sore throats, fever, asthma, allergies, sprains and dislocations, ear aches, rashes, coughs, cuts, etc. Also offers commercial driver license (CDL) physicals. 1701 NW Hawthorne Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 472-4777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 472-4777 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call for current wait times. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: General Physical Examinations * Truck Drivers Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH CARE SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
